summary: Data Engineer specializing in designing and scaling ELT pipelines that turn raw data into actionable intelligence. 3+ years building production-grade data platforms — from real-time streaming via Kafka Confluent to Medallion architectures on Databricks — with proven cost-efficiency ($2,000/month) and 97% pipeline availability. Experienced across mining, e-commerce, and manufacturing domains, with a focus on data quality, pipeline automation, and translating complex data challenges into business impact.

description: Architected and managed end-to-end ELT pipelines for 300+ raw tables across multiple source systems (On-premise DBs, Shared Folders) into a Databricks Medallion Architecture.
Achieved 97% pipeline availability while maintaining high cost-efficiency (under $2,000/month) through optimized Databricks Autoloader and Delta Live Tables (DLT) configurations.
Engineered a modular ETL agent for multi-format ingestion (Excel, CSV, JSON) into S3, integrating AI agents to automate the transformation of unstructured reports into production-ready formats.

Developed a weather-forecasting pipeline by integrating 3rd-party APIs (Meteoblue, TWC) with internal geospatial data, enabling near real-time site and weather monitoring for the Fiber Command Center.
Led Data Integration training for 15 IT Site Engineers and 4 Data Scientists, standardizing the use of the RGE framework for decentralized, data-driven solutions.

experience.position: Freelance Data Systems and Dashboard Engineer
description: Provides comprehensive financial modeling capabilities covering OPEX (Operating Expenses), CAPEX (Capital Expenses), regulatory fees, and operational fees related to water waste management.
Minimize calculation errors through standardized and automated excel formulas.
Integrate an open-source currency exchange data as a baseline to convert local fees into Euro or vice-versa.

experience.company: PT Amman Mineral Nusa Tenggara (hired by IT Vendor)
description: Optimized Supply Chain dashboards (PR, Control Tower) by migrating legacy ETL to modern ELT pipelines using Azure Data Factory and Snowflake, significantly increasing data reliability.
Designed a scalable Delta ELT pipeline to migrate 200+ on-premises tables to Snowflake, utilizing Snowpipe for automated, near-real-time file ingestion rather than scheduled tasks.
Implemented a real-time streaming pipeline using Kafka Confluent and AVEVA PI System to support operational analytics and mission-critical equipment monitoring.
Automated regional reporting for Indonesia and Vietnam, reducing manual processing time by 95% (from 60 minutes to 3 minutes) via Looker and Google API integrations.
Engineered a Python-based web scraper to identify emerging product and ingredient trends, providing the Customer Insights team with actionable market intelligence.
Performed tactical marketing analyses for high-traffic events (Flash Sales, Double-Date) to optimize marketing spend and conversion rates.
Designed and built an Executive Dashboard to provide comprehensive insights into business performance across 4 key aspects: Sales, Product, Member Behavior and Loyalty Program performance.
Developed  an  automated  report  to  analyze  Campaign  Performance  and  Member  Purchase  Behavior,  involving  data preparation and transformation into a Tableau Dashboards.
Improve E-Commerce ‘Operational Dashboard’ from 28 graphs into 18 actionable charts with the same KPIs but more utilized Tableau feature to make it easy-to-understand the insights.
Designed and built the 1st and 2nd models of EV Kit prototypes as an initial product for a new business line.
Managed and installed 8 different machines to run production lines for the 1st  EV Kit Product within 3 months.

achievements: Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Machine Learning, Database Systems, IoT Systems
Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Systems, PLC Programming, Industrial Automation
